name: VIRTUS INVESTMENT PARTNERS, INC.
summary: Virtus Investment Partners, Inc. is a Delaware corporation providing investment management and related services to institutions and individuals. Using a multi-manager, multi-style approach, it offers strategies across equity, fixed income, multi-asset, and alternatives through affiliated investment managers and unaffiliated subadvisers. Products include mutual funds, ETFs, closed-end funds, retail separate accounts, institutional accounts, and wealth advisory services. As of December 31, 2025, total assets under management were $159.5 billion.

products.name: U.S. Retail Funds
products.description: Mutual funds registered under the Investment Company Act of 1940 offered across equity, fixed income, multi-asset, and alternatives.

products.name: Exchange-Traded Funds (ETFs)
products.description: Actively managed and index-based ETFs across multiple asset classes.

products.name: Global Funds (UCITS/QIF)
products.description: Undertaking for Collective Investment in Transferable Securities and Qualifying Investor Funds offered to non-U.S. investors.

products.name: Closed-End Funds
products.description: Closed-end funds traded on the New York Stock Exchange across multi-asset, fixed income, equity, and alternatives.

products.name: Retail Separate Accounts
products.description: Separately managed accounts sold through intermediaries, including investment models for managed account sponsors.

products.name: Institutional Accounts
products.description: Institutional separate and commingled accounts including subadvisory services and structured product collateral management.

products.name: Wealth Advisory Services
products.description: Wealth management services provided to high-net-worth clients.

partnerships.description: Unaffiliated subadviser managing infrastructure fixed income and equity strategies with $2.5 billion in Virtus-sponsored products.
Unaffiliated subadviser managing utilities strategies with $1.4 billion in Virtus-sponsored products.
Unaffiliated subadviser managing income & growth and convertible strategies with $9.5 billion in Virtus-sponsored products.
Minority interest partner managing innovative growth equity; $2.1 billion in Virtus-sponsored products and $2.4 billion outside.
35% minority interest acquired December 15, 2025; manages private credit with $0.9 billion in Virtus-sponsored products.
